title: Bash Basics
summary: Variables, quoting, conditionals, loops, functions, exit codes and here-docs — the shell as a real language.

fights.title: Feed SQLite a here-doc with and without expansion

boss.title: Bash Trial
questions: Why does "$VAR" differ from $VAR, and when does word-splitting bite?
What do set -e and set -o pipefail each change about failure handling?
